text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism using a lightweight, distributed system like Apache Kafka and Redis. This will dynamically prioritize critical and recent memories, ensuring the agent focuses on preserving the most impactful data without the overhead of frequent, large-scale Docker container installs.
